mapper.sql: Id, InvoiceNo, CustomerNo, ROrderNo, ModelNo, Quantity, SubModelNo, SubQty, DeptDesc, Price, Amount, TaxAmount, OptDate, AppType, BalType, ProdFlag, ProdCode, OptCode, ECode, Remark, DeptNo, Expdate, ModelInChn, InDate, OrdType, Username, OptTime, ApplyCode, Price_apply, CreateTime, StockCode, RcvDeptNo, claim_no, claim_amount, express_company, source, warehouse_code, expdetail_id, user_no
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.sample_bal
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.sample_bal (Id, InvoiceNo, CustomerNo, ROrderNo, ModelNo, Quantity, SubModelNo, SubQty, DeptDesc, Price, Amount, TaxAmount, OptDate, AppType, BalType, ProdFlag, ProdCode, OptCode, ECode, Remark, DeptNo, Expdate, ModelInChn, InDate, OrdType, Username, OptTime, ApplyCode, Price_apply, CreateTime, StockCode, RcvDeptNo, claim_no, claim_amount, express_company, source, warehouse_code, expdetail_id, user_no ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{submodelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deptdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{apptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{baltype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prodflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{prodcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{optcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{ecode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modelinchn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{indate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{ordtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{applycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{priceApply,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rcvdeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{claimNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{claimAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{expressCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expdetailId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

mapper.update:
update dbo.sample_bal
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROrderNo = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SubModelNo = #{record.submodelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SubQty = #{record.subqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DeptDesc = #{record.deptdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TaxAmount = #{record.taxamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
OptDate = #{record.optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
AppType = #{record.apptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BalType = #{record.baltype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProdFlag = #{record.prodflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
ProdCode = #{record.prodcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptCode = #{record.optcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
ECode = #{record.ecode,jdbcType=CHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Expdate = #{record.expdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ModelInChn = #{record.modelinchn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InDate = #{record.indate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OrdType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
Username = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptTime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ApplyCode = #{record.applycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Price_apply = #{record.priceApply,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CreateTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RcvDeptNo = #{record.rcvdeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
claim_no = #{record.claimNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
claim_amount = #{record.claimAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
express_company = #{record.expressCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
source = #{record.source,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expdetail_id = #{record.expdetailId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.sample_bal set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROrderNo = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, SubModelNo = #{record.submodelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SubQty = #{record.subqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, DeptDesc = #{record.deptdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TaxAmount = #{record.taxamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, OptDate = #{record.optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, AppType = #{record.apptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BalType = #{record.baltype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ProdFlag = #{record.prodflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, ProdCode = #{record.prodcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, OptCode = #{record.optcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, ECode = #{record.ecode,jdbcType=CHAR}, Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Expdate = #{record.expdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ModelInChn = #{record.modelinchn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InDate = #{record.indate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, OrdType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, Username = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OptTime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ApplyCode = #{record.applycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Price_apply = #{record.priceApply,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, CreateTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RcvDeptNo = #{record.rcvdeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, claim_no = #{record.claimNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, claim_amount = #{record.claimAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, express_company = #{record.expressCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source = #{record.source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expdetail_id = #{record.expdetailId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.sample_bal
InvoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROrderNo = #{rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
SubModelNo = #{submodelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SubQty = #{subqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DeptDesc = #{deptdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TaxAmount = #{taxamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
OptDate = #{optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
AppType = #{apptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BalType = #{baltype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProdFlag = #{prodflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
ProdCode = #{prodcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptCode = #{optcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
ECode = #{ecode,jdbcType=CHAR},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
DeptNo = #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Expdate = #{expdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ModelInChn = #{modelinchn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InDate = #{indate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OrdType = #{ordtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
Username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptTime = #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ApplyCode = #{applycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Price_apply = #{priceApply,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CreateTime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
StockCode = #{stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RcvDeptNo = #{rcvdeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
claim_no = #{claimNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
claim_amount = #{claimAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
express_company = #{expressCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
source = #{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expdetail_id = #{expdetailId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.sample_bal set InvoiceNo = #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROrderNo = #{rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, SubModelNo = #{submodelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SubQty = #{subqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, DeptDesc = #{deptdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, Amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TaxAmount = #{taxamount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, OptDate = #{optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, AppType = #{apptype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BalType = #{baltype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ProdFlag = #{prodflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, ProdCode = #{prodcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, OptCode = #{optcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, ECode = #{ecode,jdbcType=CHAR}, Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DeptNo = #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Expdate = #{expdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ModelInChn = #{modelinchn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InDate = #{indate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, OrdType = #{ordtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, Username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OptTime = #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ApplyCode = #{applycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Price_apply = #{priceApply,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, CreateTime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, StockCode = #{stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RcvDeptNo = #{rcvdeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, claim_no = #{claimNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, claim_amount = #{claimAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, express_company = #{expressCompany,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source = #{source,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expdetail_id = #{expdetailId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where Id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
